overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a neon-lit urban plaza in Night City. The scene features holographic advertisements, towering glass skyscrapers, and a massive holographic koi fish swimming between buildings. The player interacts with an NPC on the ground before continuing through the plaza with illuminated floor panels.

events.description: player approaches and interacts with NPC sitting on the ground near a bench
exits the covered walkway into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: approaching a seated NPC on the ground, engaging in a brief interaction, then continuing forward through the pedestrian area

NPC sitting on a bench wearing white clothing and a hat

tall palm tree in a planter box along the walkway
sleek black and white bench with seated NPC
modern building with geometric patterns and dark panels

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees and large digital billboards. They approach and interact with an NPC sitting on the ground near a bench, while another NPC sits on the bench nearby. The area is sheltered with neon overhead lighting before transitioning to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic displays and towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the holographic fish swimming between the skyscrapers
giant holographic blue koi fish swims overhead between the corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the holographic fish swimming between the skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive black glass skyscraper with corporate logo near the top, towering over the plaza
large glowing blue holographic koi fish swimming in the air between buildings
smaller orange holographic koi fish swimming behind the blue one
yellow-illuminated elevated roadway or transit track curving through the scene
tall vertical digital signage on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide-open plaza surrounded by massive glass skyscrapers. The camera tilts upward to reveal a stunning holographic blue koi fish swimming through the air between the towers, accompanied by a smaller orange fish. Palm trees line the walkway as the player continues forward, observing the neon-lit corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with illuminated floor panels and digital poster walls

events.description: passing over illuminated floor panels with AV text and grid patterns

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated floor panels and digital poster walls while continuing through the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the illuminated floor panel while looking at a device

entered.detail: large rectangular floor panel with blue LED grid and AV text, bordered with orange neon
series of yellow-framed digital poster displays along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the plaza, passing over illuminated floor panels displaying AV text in glowing blue. The mega tower remains visible to the left while digital poster walls line the right side. The holographic fish disappear from view as the player moves deeper into the plaza area with scattered pedestrians walking about.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into a vast, neon-drenched corporate plaza. It begins under a covered path lined with palm trees and digital billboards, where the camera pauses to interact with an NPC sitting on the ground near a bench. As the player moves forward, the shelter gives way to a wide-open expanse surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, and the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive holographic blue koi fish and a smaller orange fish swimming through the air. The scene then shifts back toward the ground as the player advances over illuminated floor panels glowing with blue text, passing between a looming mega tower and walls of digital posters. Finally, the holographic fish fade from view as the camera pushes deeper into the plaza among scattered pedestrians and glowing corporate architecture.
